summary: Russian operators of the Rubikon Center conducted strikes across multiple sectors on March 5, 2026, including Donbas, Sumy, and Krasny Liman, destroying 128 targets such as Ukrainian 2S22 "Bogdan" self-propelled artillery, M109 howitzers, and a T-64BV tank. Ukrainian forces are using the PTS-303 rotating antenna system, costing 3-5 thousand hryvnias, for FPV video and interceptor operations, capable of vertical and horizontal rotation on 24 and 220 volts. On the front lines, Ukrainian forces are employing plastic mesh-based antenna concealment to protect radar and drone control stations from aerial reconnaissance. An FPV drone narrowly missed a Russian Mi-8 helicopter in a close call.
